CustomField.description: Monthly Discretionary Expenses Of Family Formula
CustomField.formula: Rent_Mortgage_Hypothec_Expenses__c + Property_Taxes_Condo_Fees_Expenses__c + Heating_Gas_Oil_Expenses__c + Telephone_Expenses__c + Cable_Expenses__c + Hydro_Expenses__c + Water_Expenses__c + Furniture_Expenses__c + Other_Housing_Expenses__c + Smoking_Expenses__c + Alcohol_Expenses__c + Dining_Expenses__c + Entertainment_Sports_Expenses__c + Gifts_Charitable_Expenses__c + Allowances_Expenses__c + Other_Personal_Expenses__c + Prescriptions_Expenses__c + Dental_Expenses__c + Other_Medical_Expenses__c + Food_Grocery_Expenses__c + Laundry_Dry_Cleaning_Expenses__c + Grooming_Toiletries_Expenses__c + Clothing_Expenses__c + Other_Living_Expenses__c + Car_Lease_Payments_Expenses__c + Repair_Maintenance_Gas_Expenses__c + Public_Transportation_Expenses__c + Other_TransportationExpenses__c + Vehicle_Expenses__c + House_Expenses__c + Furniture_Contents_Expenses__c + Life_Insurance_Expenses__c + Other_Insurance_Expenses__c + Payments_To_Proposal__c + Payment_To_Secured_Creditor__c + Payments_Other_Than_Mortgage_Vehicle__c + Other_Payments__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Monthly Discretionary Expenses Of Family Formula
CustomField.label: Monthly Discretinary Exp Of Family Frml
